alerts.title: Added: European Union Microbiology Limits - Foodborne bacteria, toxins, and metabolites (e.g., Salmonella, Listeria monocytogenes, Enterobacter sakazakii, staphylococcal enterotoxins, histamine)
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Verification required. Commission Regulation (EC) No 2073/2005 lays down food safety criteria for relevant foodborne bacteria, their toxins and metabolites in specific foods, and also process hygiene criteria.

alerts.title: Added: GCC Labelling Requirement - General labelling requirements
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Verification required as per GSO 9:2022. This GSO technical regulation specifies general requirements for the labelling of prepackaged foodstuffs.

alerts.title: Added: GCC Labelling Requirement - Halal food general requirements
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Verification required as per GSO 2055-1:2015. This GSO technical regulation outlines general requirements for Halal food.

alerts.title: Added: GCC Labelling Requirement - Mandatory expiration dates
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Verification required as per GSO 150-1:2013. This GSO technical regulation specifies mandatory expiration dates for food products.

alerts.title: Added: GCC Microbiology Limits - Microbiological criteria
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Verification required as per GSO 1016:2015. This GSO technical regulation is concerned with microbiological limits for various foodstuffs and food ingredients used in the food industry.

alerts.title: Added: Japan Additive Limits - Use of additives
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Verification required (prohibited unless specified by MHLW as harmless). Excludes natural flavoring agents and generally consumed substances used as additives. MHLW specifies which additives are unlikely to cause harm.

alerts.title: Added: Japan Contaminant Limits - Contamination or addition of foreign substances in food/additives
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Prohibited for sale/handling if likely to cause harm. Applies to food or additives likely to cause harm to human health due to contamination or the addition of foreign substances or on other grounds.

alerts.title: Added: Japan Contaminant Limits - Residues of agricultural chemicals, feed additives, pharmaceuticals
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Prohibited if exceeding MHLW specified quantity. MHLW specifies quantities unlikely to cause harm. This is the basis for the Positive List System.

alerts.title: Added: Japan Contaminant Limits - Toxic or harmful substances in apparatus, containers, and packaging
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Prohibited for sale/production/import/use if likely to cause harm. Also applies if they have a harmful effect on food or additives.

alerts.title: Added: Japan Contaminant Limits - Toxic or harmful substances in food/additives
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Prohibited for sale/handling (unless specified harmless). Exception when the Minister of Health, Labour and Welfare specifies that the substances are unlikely to cause harm to human health.

alerts.title: Added: Japan Microbiology Limits - Import of livestock meat, milk, organs, and products thereof
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Must have certificates from exporting country's governmental organization. Certificates must confirm absence of specified diseases/abnormalities. Exception for countries with telecommunications data exchange.

alerts.title: Added: Japan Microbiology Limits - Pathogen contamination in food/additives
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Prohibited for sale/handling if likely to cause harm. Applies to food or additives contaminated with pathogens or suspected to be so, and which are likely to cause harm to human health.

alerts.title: Added: Japan Microbiology Limits - Rotten, deteriorated, or immature food/additives
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Prohibited for sale/handling (unless harmless). Exception for those unlikely to cause harm to human health and recognized as edible.

alerts.title: Added: Singapore Additive Limits - Food additives
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Compliance with specific regulatory limits required. Limits vary depending on the additive and food type. Refer to 'Guidance Information on Requirements for Use of Food Additives' and SFA's Legislation.

alerts.title: Added: Singapore Additive Limits - Non-permitted food additives
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Prohibited for import or sale. An application can be submitted to SFA to evaluate the use of a non-permitted additive.

alerts.title: Added: Singapore Contaminant Limits - Contaminants / Incidental constituents
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Must be within SFA regulatory limits. Specific limits for various contaminants (microbiological, heavy metals, mycotoxins, veterinary drug residues, pesticide residues, other incidental constituents) require verification from SFA's relevant documents and Legislation.

alerts.title: Added: Singapore Contaminant Limits - Contaminants / Incidental constituents exceeding limits
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Prohibited for import or sale.

alerts.title: Added: Singapore Labelling Requirement - Declaration of ingredients and additives
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Must be declared in list of ingredients on food labels.

alerts.title: Added: Singapore Labelling Requirement - General labelling requirements
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Must comply.

alerts.title: Added: Taiwan Allergen List - Crustacean shellfish, mango, peanuts, sesame seeds, milk and goat milk, eggs, tree nuts, gluten-containing cereals, soybeans, fish, sulphite
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: 10. Labeling is required if these allergens are present as an ingredient or food additive. The limit of 10 mg/kg applies to sulphite as residue sulphur dioxide.

alerts.title: Added: Thailand Contaminant Limits - Pesticide Residues (Maximum Residue Limits - MRLs)
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Compliance with ASEAN MRLs. Food products must comply with the maximum residue limits for toxic substances as specified in the updated ASEAN MRLs list.

alerts.title: Added: Thailand Labelling Requirement - Prohibited Foods
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Prohibition. A list of foods prohibited from production, import, or sale exists and must be verified.

alerts.title: Added: United States Additive Limits - Delisted color additives
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Prohibited from use. Delisted color additives are listed in FDA regulations (21 CFR 81.10 and/or 81.30).

alerts.title: Added: United States Additive Limits - Prohibited substances
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Prohibited from use. Prohibited substances are listed in FDA regulations (21 CFR Part 189).

alerts.title: Added: United States Allergen List - Major Food Allergens
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Milk, eggs, fish, Crustacean shellfish, tree nuts, peanuts, wheat, soybeans, and sesame. These 9 allergens are identified by the Food Allergen Labeling and Consumer Protection Act of 2004 (FALCPA) and the FASTER Act. The effective date is for sesame.

alerts.title: Added: United States Contaminant Limits - 3-Monochloropropane-1,2-Diol (3-MCPD)
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: 1. This is a Guidance Level.

alerts.title: Modified: United States Contaminant Limits - Aflatoxins, total
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: Old: 20. New: 20. This is an Action Level.

alerts.title: Added: United States Contaminant Limits - Aflatoxins, total
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: 20. This is an Action Level.

alerts.title: Added: United States Contaminant Limits - Poisonous or deleterious substances
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Must comply with FDA levels. Contaminant levels include tolerances, action levels, guidance levels, derived intervention levels, recommended maximum levels, and advisory levels. Tolerances and action levels are defined in 21 CFR parts 109 and 509.

alerts.title: Added: United States Labelling Requirement - "Gluten-free" claim
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Must meet FDA's defined standard for gluten content. Specific compliance requirements exist for fermented and hydrolyzed foods bearing the "gluten-free" claim (effective August 12, 2020).

alerts.title: Added: United States Labelling Requirement - Allergen preventive controls
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Required under 21 CFR part 117. The "Current Good Manufacturing Practice, Hazard Analysis, and Risk-Based Preventive Controls for Human Food" rule (CGMP & PC rule) establishes requirements for allergen preventive controls to prevent cross-contact and undeclared allergens.

alerts.title: Added: United States Labelling Requirement - Cochineal extract and carmine
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Must be declared on the label. Identified as allergenic substances derived from insects.

alerts.title: Added: United States Labelling Requirement - Declaration of Major Food Allergens
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Must be specifically labeled. Applies to most packaged food products.

alerts.title: Added: United States Labelling Requirement - Declaration of specific types of tree nuts, fish, and Crustacean shellfish
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Type of tree nut, species of fish, and species of Crustacean shellfish must be declared. Examples: almonds, pecans, walnuts for tree nuts; bass, flounder, cod for fish; crab, lobster, shrimp for Crustacean shellfish.

alerts.title: Added: United States Labelling Requirement - FD&C Yellow No. 5
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Must be identified on labels. Required due to potential hypersensitivity reactions in some individuals.

alerts.title: Added: United States Labelling Requirement - Format for Major Food Allergen Declaration
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: In parentheses after ingredient name OR in a "contains" statement. Examples: “lecithin (soy),” “flour (wheat),” “whey (milk)” or “Contains wheat, milk, and soy.”

alerts.title: Added: United States Labelling Requirement - Sulfiting agents (e.g., sodium bisulfite)
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: ≥10. Must be declared on food labels when present at or above the specified concentration.

alerts.title: Added: China Additive Limits - Food Additives
alerts.details: New: Verification required. This standard specifies the varieties, scope of use, and maximum usage levels of food additives.

alerts.title: Removed: China Additive Limits - Food Additive Use
alerts.details: Old: Verification required per GB 2760-2015. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Added: Codex Additive Limits - Permitted food additives
alerts.details: New: Verification required via the Codex General Standard for Food Additives (GSFA) Online Database (Codex STAN 192-1995). The GSFA sets forth the conditions under which permitted food additives may be used in all foods. Users are encouraged to consult the database and its Preamble for specific provisions.

alerts.title: Removed: Codex Additive Limits - Permitted food additives
alerts.details: Old: Verification required. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Added: Codex Contaminant Limits - Contaminants (e.g., mycotoxins, metals like arsenic, lead, mercury)
alerts.details: New: Verification required via the General Standard for Contaminants and Toxins in Food and Feed (CXS 193-1995). Codex establishes maximum levels (MLs) for contaminants to protect human health. The Codex Committee on Contaminants in Food (CCCF) establishes and endorses these levels.

alerts.title: Removed: Codex Contaminant Limits - Contaminants and naturally occurring toxicants
alerts.details: Old: Verification required against Codex maximum levels (MLs). Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Removed: Codex Contaminant Limits - Mycotoxins
alerts.details: Old: Adherence to Code of Practice required. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Added: European Union Additive Limits - Food Additives
alerts.details: New: Verification required. The Additives Database provides information on food additives approved for use in the EU and their conditions of use, based on the Union list of food additives in Annex II of Regulation (EC) No 1333/2008.

alerts.title: Removed: European Union Additive Limits - Food additives
alerts.details: Old: Verification required. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Removed: European Union Microbiology Limits - Foodborne bacteria, toxins and metabolites (e.g., Salmonella, Listeria monocytogenes, Enterobacter sakazakii, staphylococcal enterotoxins, histamine)
alerts.details: Old: Verification required. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Removed: GCC/GSO Additive Limits - Specific additive limits
alerts.details: Old: Verification required. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Removed: GCC/GSO Allergen List - Mandatory allergen declaration
alerts.details: Old: Verification required. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Removed: GCC/GSO Contaminant Limits - Specific contaminant limits
alerts.details: Old: Verification required. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Removed: GCC/GSO Labelling Requirement - General labelling requirements
alerts.details: Old: Verification required. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Removed: GCC/GSO Labelling Requirement - Specific requirements for sports supplementary foods
alerts.details: Old: Verification required. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Removed: GCC/GSO Microbiology Limits - Specific microbiological criteria
alerts.details: Old: Verification required. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Removed: GCC/GSO Salt / Sodium Limits - Specific salt/sodium limits
alerts.details: Old: Verification required. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Removed: GCC Labelling Requirement - Expiration dates
alerts.details: Old: Verification required. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Removed: GCC Labelling Requirement - General labelling requirements
alerts.details: Old: Verification required. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Removed: GCC Labelling Requirement - General requirements for supplementary sport foods
alerts.details: Old: Verification required. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Removed: GCC Labelling Requirement - Halal requirements
alerts.details: Old: Verification required. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Removed: GCC Microbiology Limits - Microbiological limits
alerts.details: Old: Verification required. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Removed: India Additive Limits - Food Additives
alerts.details: Old: Verification required as per FSSAI Food Additives Regulations. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Removed: India Labelling Requirement - General Labelling Requirements
alerts.details: Old: Verification required as per FSSAI Labelling and Display Regulations. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Added: Indonesia Additive Limits - Compliance for Imported Processed Foods
alerts.details: New: Verification required. Imported processed foods are subject to surveillance to ensure compliance with Indonesian additive limits.

alerts.title: Modified: Indonesia Additive Limits - Dinitrogen Monoxide (N2O)
alerts.details: Old: Verification required. New: Verification required. Specific regulations exist for the production, import, registration, and circulation of Dinitrogen Monoxide (N2O) as a food additive.

alerts.title: Added: Indonesia Contaminant Limits - Compliance for Imported Processed Foods
alerts.details: New: Verification required. Imported processed foods are subject to surveillance to ensure compliance with Indonesian contaminant limits.

alerts.title: Added: Indonesia Labelling Requirement - Compliance for Imported Processed Foods
alerts.details: New: Verification required. Imported processed foods are subject to surveillance to ensure compliance with Indonesian labelling requirements.

alerts.title: Added: Indonesia Labelling Requirement - Export Certificate for Processed Foods
alerts.details: New: Verification required. This regulation outlines the procedures for obtaining an export certificate for processed foods, implying that such a certificate is required for export.

alerts.title: Added: Indonesia Labelling Requirement - Food Category Classification
alerts.details: New: Verification required. This regulation establishes the classification system for food categories, which is essential for correct product identification and labelling of processed foods.

alerts.title: Removed: Indonesia Labelling Requirement - Export Certificate Procedures
alerts.details: Old: Verification required. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Removed: Indonesia Labelling Requirement - Food Categories
alerts.details: Old: Verification required. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Removed: Indonesia Labelling Requirement - Import Surveillance
alerts.details: Old: Verification required. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Added: Indonesia Microbiology Limits - Compliance for Imported Processed Foods
alerts.details: New: Verification required. Imported processed foods are subject to surveillance to ensure compliance with Indonesian microbiology limits.

alerts.title: Removed: Japan Additive Limits - Food Additive Specifications and Standards
alerts.details: Old: Verification required against the Specifications and Standards. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Removed: Japan Additive Limits - Food Additives
alerts.details: Old: Verification required against relevant regulations. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Added: Japan Contaminant Limits - Standards for apparatus, containers, packaging, raw materials, and production methods
alerts.details: New: Verification required (must conform to MHLW established standards/criteria). The Minister of Health, Labour and Welfare may establish standards for apparatus, or containers and packaging, or their raw materials, and criteria for production methods. Non-conforming items are prohibited.

alerts.title: Removed: Japan Contaminant Limits - Agricultural Chemical Residues
alerts.details: Old: Verification required against the Positive List System. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Removed: Japan Contaminant Limits - Bovine Spongiform Encephalopathy (BSE)
alerts.details: Old: Verification required for BSE-related food safety measures. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Removed: Japan Contaminant Limits - Food Contaminant Specifications and Standards
alerts.details: Old: Verification required against the Specifications and Standards. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Removed: Japan Contaminant Limits - Radioactivity
alerts.details: Old: Verification required for regulations on food contaminated by radioactivity. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Added: Japan Labelling Requirement - Food safety
alerts.details: New: Ensure safety. Food business operators must endeavor to ensure the safety of food, additives, apparatus, or containers and packaging.

alerts.title: Added: Japan Labelling Requirement - Hazard response
alerts.details: New: Take necessary measures appropriately and promptly. Includes providing records to authorities and disposing of hazardous food.
